_meta.title: FF Model
_meta.note: XL turbo (9.5GB) is the template default. buildAceStep ALWAYS patches unet_name from the models.ts profile checkpoint — the music-bed-draft profile swaps in acestep_v1.5_turbo.safetensors (4.5GB) here; no second template file (the graphs are byte-identical otherwise, unlike the LoRA-restructured wan22_camera_draft/vace_ref_draft pattern).

_meta.title: ACE Text Encoders
_meta.note: Verbatim from the official Comfy-Org audio_ace_step_1_5_split template: BOTH qwen encoders (0.6b + 1.7b), DualCLIPLoader type 'ace'.

inputs.tags: Cinematic ambient underscore: warm analog pads, slow evolving textures, soft piano motifs, gentle build, spacious reverb, documentary background music, calm and focused

_meta.title: FF Tags
_meta.note: ONE node carries tags + lyrics + seed + duration (all patched by buildAceStep; duration is kept in lockstep with the latent seconds). '[instrumental]' lyrics = no vocals (the official v1 t2a_instrumentals template convention). bpm/timesignature/language/keyscale template-locked at the node defaults; generate_audio_codes true = the audio-codes LLM pass the official 1.5 templates ship (slower, higher quality). cfg_scale 2.0 is the LLM's own guidance, distinct from the KSampler cfg 1.

_meta.title: Zero Negative
_meta.note: Official template negative: zeroed positive conditioning (no negative text encode exists for ACE-Step 1.5).

_meta.title: Shift
_meta.note: shift 3 — verbatim from the official audio_ace_step_1_5_split template.

_meta.title: FF Sampler S1
_meta.note: TURBO recipe, verbatim from the official 1.5 split template: 8 steps, cfg 1, euler/simple, denoise 1. Stock KSampler — the seed input is `seed` (NOT `noise_seed`), same as the wan_alpha lane.

_meta.title: FF Output
_meta.note: Lands under the `audio` key in ComfyUI history outputs (SavedAudios.as_dict — comfy_api/latest/_ui.py), NOT gifs/videos/images; extractOutputFilename handles it. V0 VBR ≈ 245kbps, the official template default.
